project_type: Next.js 16 full-stack app with React 19, multi-agent AI engineering collaboration platform
build_system: npm with next build; uses Tailwind CSS v4 via @tailwindcss/postcss; Prisma ORM for database
test_framework: Vitest with vitest.setup.ts (database cleanup per test); fast-check for property-based testing; tests in src/lib/*.test.ts
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation and Next.js build. 2. Run npm run test to run all vitest tests. 3. Run npm run lint to check for linting errors.
setup_instructions: 1. npm install. 2. Copy .env.example to .env if needed. 3. npx prisma generate to generate client. 4. npm run build to verify.
environment_constraints: AGENTS.md warns that this uses Next.js 16 with breaking changes from training data - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code. All tests use Prisma database and require DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db. Component tests (if added) would need jsdom environment.
contribution_requirements: Reuse existing design tokens (CSS variables in globals.css). Reuse expand/collapse pattern from ArtifactCard.tsx. Match aria-label/aria-expanded/keyboard-handler conventions from AgentArena.tsx. Respect prefers-reduced-motion (already handled globally). Do not restructure navigation tabs.
key_patterns: Components use 'use client' directive. Framer Motion for animations (motion, AnimatePresence). lucide-react for icons. State fetched via SWR hooks (useEventStream). Color tokens as CSS vars in globals.css. Agent colors: senior=blue(#3b82f6), security=red(#ef4444), performance=amber(#f59e0b), product=violet(#8b5cf6). ArtifactCard has canonical expand/collapse: useState(boolean), onClick toggle, conditional render detail. AgentArena has accessible keyboard handlers (Enter/Space, aria-expanded, role=button, tabIndex=0, focus-visible ring).
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes; src/components/workspace/ - main workspace UI components; src/components/landing/ - landing page; src/components/session/ - session management; src/components/ui/ - shared UI atoms; src/hooks/ - SWR data hooks; src/lib/ - server-side business logic; src/types/ - TypeScript type definitions; src/schemas/ - Zod validation schemas
